# Pull Request

## Summary

What does this PR change?

## Type of change

- [ ] Content correction
- [ ] New content
- [ ] Lab improvement
- [ ] Template improvement
- [ ] Reference update
- [ ] Repository maintenance

## Affected areas

List files or folders changed:

```text
path/to/file.md
```

## Teaching impact

How does this improve the course?

## Safety review

Confirm:

- [ ] No real credentials or secrets are included.
- [ ] No real customer, employee, or private data is included.
- [ ] Lab content is framed for authorized local environments.
- [ ] Offensive techniques are paired with defensive learning or mitigations.
- [ ] Third-party content was not copied without permission.

## Reference check

- [ ] References are official or credible where possible.
- [ ] Links were checked.
- [ ] Claims are not overstated.

## Checklist

- [ ] Markdown renders correctly.
- [ ] File names follow repository style.
- [ ] New templates or labs are linked from relevant README files.
- [ ] Course map or syllabus updated if needed.
